creator: vlad-fbsd@acheronmedia.com
text:
(In reply to m.tsatsenko from comment #4)

I don't think maintainer-approval- works when there was no request to begin with. I'll check with the BZ team. At any rate, your patch obsoletes the previous one, which is the correct action. Please provide maintainer-feedback+ on the entire report, it was requested. :)
